steps.title: Close the inserted list
steps.content: The phrase beginning with including is set off by an opening dash and contains a list of Greek deities. After Crius, the punctuation must close that inserted phrase so the main clause can continue.

steps.title: Use the matching dash
steps.content: The matching punctuation closes the dash-framed insertion after Crius. Choice A uses a semicolon that suggests another list item, Choice C uses a comma that does not match the opening dash, and Choice D leaves the insertion unclosed. The answer is B.
